title: gladiolus paniculatus
intro: Gladiolus paniculatus, also known as the Naked Sword Lily or Desert Candle, is a plant species that belongs to the Iridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal benefits.
